org.apache.paimon.flink.sink

Class StoreMultiCommitter

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.paimon.flink.sink.StoreMultiCommitter
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    AutoCloseable, Committer<MultiTableCommittable,WrappedManifestCommittable>

    public class StoreMultiCommitter
extends Object
implements Committer<MultiTableCommittable,WrappedManifestCommittable>
    StoreMultiCommitter for multiple dynamic store. During the commit process, it will group the WrappedManifestCommittables by their table identifier and use different committers to commit to different tables.

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface org.apache.paimon.flink.sink.Committer

        Committer.Factory<CommitT,GlobalCommitT>
